description: Olive green, round toed slip-on styled casual shoes Nubuck upper with stitched detail on the periphery of the toe box and midfoot region, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, elasticated inserts at the side of the tongue Mesh padded inner and tongue with a soft, mesh padded footbed footbed for refreshing and dry comfort Upper adhered and stitched to the outsole Rubber outsole with terraced lugs on the periphery and lugs in the centre, extending slightly in front and back to form heel and toe guard Comes with a shoe bag
